user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Wide World Importers.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 15:08 EST
Subject: Re: deployment blockers Discussion - Next Steps

There's been a change in our timeline for deployment blockers. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
Date: 2024-01-13 08:02 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Wide World Importers
Date: 2024-03-24
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), Priya (Wide World Importers)

[00:01:30] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into deployment blockers.

[00:08:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:10:00] Priya (Wide World Importers): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:12:00] Priya (Wide World Importers): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.

[00:15:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is budget approval.

[00:19:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:22:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:25:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for technical validation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:28:00] Priya (Wide World Importers): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:33:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:35:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around stakeholder alignment.
